name: Data / Cable / Ethernet > Install Audio Cable Jacks
taxonomy_path: Labor > Data / Cable / Ethernet > Install Audio Cable Jacks
refer_note: New in-wall low-voltage runs may fall under Florida limited-energy licensing. We confirm scope; existing-jack work we handle.
basis: Install audio (speaker) jack: cut box, fish short cable, terminate binding-post/keystone, plate. Keystone+plate+wire ~$15. VERIFY: new in-wall low-voltage run may fall under FL limited-energy (ES) license.
sources: Homewyse in-wall network cable $233-$457/run; pro low-voltage jack termination $75-$150/port. Task-only ~$90-120 for a new speaker/audio jack with short in-wall pull.

name: Data / Cable / Ethernet > Install Cable Jack - Ground Up

refer_note: New in-wall low-voltage runs may fall under Florida limited-energy licensing. We confirm scope; existing-jack work we handle.
basis: New coax (cable TV) jack ground-up: cut box, fish RG6, crimp F-connector, terminate keystone, plate, test. Coax+keystone+plate ~$12. VERIFY: new in-wall run may need FL limited-energy license.
sources: Homewyse in-wall network cable $233-$457/run; low-voltage per-port install $75-$150. Task-only ~$100-130 for a new coax jack with a fresh pull.

name: Data / Cable / Ethernet > Replace Cable Jack
taxonomy_path: Labor > Data / Cable / Ethernet > Replace Cable Jack
basis: Replace coax jack on existing in-wall cable: pull plate, re-crimp/re-terminate keystone, new plate, test. Keystone+plate ~$8. Uses existing wiring - handyman-legal.
sources: Low-voltage jack swap / re-terminate $50-$90; existing cable in wall, no new run. Task-only ~$50-70.

name: Data / Cable / Ethernet > Replace Data Jack
taxonomy_path: Labor > Data / Cable / Ethernet > Replace Data Jack
basis: Replace data keystone on existing in-wall Cat cable: pull plate, re-punch keystone, new plate, test. Keystone+plate ~$8. Uses existing wiring - handyman-legal.
sources: Low-voltage jack swap / re-terminate $50-$90; existing cable in wall. Task-only ~$50-70.
